contracts.description: uniqueById returns Contract[] and never throws

evidence.snippet: function uniqueById(contracts: Contract[]): Contract[] { const seen = new Set<string>(); return contracts.filter((contract) => { if (seen.has(contract.id)) return false; seen.add(contract.id); return true; }); }
evidence.reasoning: Explicit return type is Contract[]; no_throw=true
